selection_rationale: picks-wave7.json pre-staged 13 NEW shortcodes (all 13 are absent from analyzed-videos.json). Took the FULL set since each was already vetted by the wave-7 planner. Three (DY0Y, DYu6, DWT*) came from gallery-dl --count 25 (gallery-dl returned 10 reels; 7 were already-analyzed exclusions, 2 were new picks, 1 was DWT-56ED4Hu which wasn't in picks and was discarded). The remaining 11 older shortcodes (DVoZ → DRVR) required yt-dlp fallback because they fell outside the gallery-dl --count=25 window (Bilawal posts often, so 25 only covered ~Mar 2026 → present).

scrape_method_notes.gallery-dl: Returned 10 reels for --count 25. 3 NEW: DY0YpxjPrYV, DYu6vmbPQQW (also DWT-56ED4Hu, discarded).
scrape_method_notes.yt-dlp: Used as fallback for 11 older shortcodes pre-staged in picks-wave7.json. All 11 downloaded successfully with --write-info-json. URL form: https://www.instagram.com/p/<shortcode>/
